figures.caption: Figure 1. Comparative genomics and cold tolerance test in A. leucurus 199 A. Photo of a wild Ammospermophilus leucurus (top) and the contigN50 metrics across Sciuridae 200 species (bottom). B. A phylogenetic tree of Sciuridae species included in the comparative 201 genomics analysis. C. Corresponding TOGA gene intactness metrics for each species. Species 202 are grouped into their genus and status as a hibernator or non-hibernator. D. Schematic of the 203 cold exposure (top) and principal component analysis of all samples across treatments (bottom). 204 A heatmap for all differentially expressed genes following cold exposure in brown adipose tissue 205 (E.), white adipose tissue (F.), and skeletal muscle (G.). Genes with an adjusted p < 0.05 at either 206 24hrs or 10 days following cold exposure were included in the heatmap for each tissue. Genes of 207 interest are shown as fold change relative to room temperature (RT) samples for brown adipose 208
